selected_tasks.body_preview: Objective: Exercise the eval harness end-to-end with a real code patch for the first time. The harness has 368 fixtures and a smoke test proving the pipeline loads, but zero actual evaluations have ever run. Pick one recent, well-understood commit diff (e.g., the Day 99 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY→DEEPSEEK_API_KEY fix in lib.rs, or the reverse-shell false-positive fix
selected_tasks.title: Run first real eval through the eval harness

selected_tasks.body_preview: Objective: Add a state event that fires at session startup before the first prompt or tool call, capturing enough context to diagnose the "8 sessions crashed before first tool call" problem reported in today's journal. Currently, sessions that crash before firing a single tool produce only RunStarted and Error markers with no diagnostic content. A SessionSta
selected_tasks.title: Add session-start diagnostic event for silent pre-tool-call crash visibility

selected_tasks.body_preview: Objective: Move the `build_graph_hotspots_report` and `build_graph_hotspots_payload` functions (plus any private helpers they depend on) from `src/commands_state.rs` (23,736-line monolith) to `src/commands_state_graph.rs` (1168 lines, already contains `handle_graph_subcommand`). This is the first step in splitting the monolith — one self-contained function g
selected_tasks.title: Extract graph hotspots functions from commands_state.rs to commands_state_graph.rs
